pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i keep waking up and for a split second i forget, and then it hits me all over again. the house feels like a museum of a life that doesn't exist anymore. i'm just going through the motions, eating and sleeping, but i don't feel real. it feels like i'm just a ghost haunting my own living room. i don't even know why i'm botherin with any of it.
